ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Continued To Apr-08-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nathan Pastor for Manu Sharma.

Mr. Pastor stated that his Client filed a petition for final distribution, but it was taken off calendar at the last hearing, that he thinks the only thing left to do is an inventory and appraisal, that he tried to e-file the inventory, but was told he had to bring it in and that he has it with him for filing today. Mr. Pastor also asked if the petition could be put back on calendar. The Court informed Mr. Pastor that he needs to file a new petition. Status on close of estate is continued to April 8, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The First and Final Account and Report; Petition for Allowance of Attorney's Statutory Fees and for Final Distribution is Off Calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
